parameters.content:
## WF-V9-01 — Website Intake Hub

**What it does:** Receives every form submission from the NIL Wealth Strategies website, validates the data, checks for duplicates, stores it in Supabase (nil.submissions), sends a SendGrid confirmation email, sends a Twilio SMS if a phone number was provided, and notifies the Telegram ops dashboard.

**Why it matters:** This is the front door. Every parent or athlete who fills out the website form comes through here. Without this workflow, submissions are lost, no one gets a confirmation, and the bot's /submissions screen stays empty.

**Webhook path:** vercel-instant-submission — unchanged from V20, Vercel already points here. No URL change needed.

**Tables written:** nil.submissions

**Replaces:** NIL WF01 — Form & Calendly Intake — V20

parameters.message: =Hi {{ $('Validate Submission').item.json.first_name }}! Thanks for your interest in NIL Wealth protection for {{ $('Validate Submission').item.json.athlete_name || 'your athlete' }}. We'll email you shortly with next steps. Book a call: https://calendly.com/protection-mynilwealthstrategies/questions

parameters.name: text

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { payload: { schema_version: '5.3', event_type: 'n8n.heartbeat', source: 'wf_v9_01', direction: 'inbound', trace_id: $execution.id, idempotency_key: 'heartbeat|wf_v9_01|' + $now, payload: { workflow: 'WF-V9-01', status: 'ok' } } } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { success: true, submission_id: $('Validate Submission').item.json.submission_id, message: 'Thank you! Email and SMS sent.' } }}
